items.title: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials)
items.summaryShort: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials). Google recently announced that WebMCP is entering origin trials in Chrome 149.

items.title: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents. Google has announced the Google Colab CLI, a command-line tool that allows developers and AI agents to interact with remote Colab runtimes directly from a local terminal.

items.title: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture
items.summaryShort: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture. Slack modernized its data platform by replacing SSH based execution in Amazon EMR pipelines with a REST driven orchestration layer called Quarry.

items.title: Angular's Official Agent Skills Helps AI Coding Tools Write Modern Angular
items.summaryShort: Angular's Official Agent Skills Helps AI Coding Tools Write Modern Angular. Google's Angular team has released a repository called angular/skills, focusing on Agent Skills that enhance AI coding agents' ability to write modern Angular code.

items.title: Pinecone Brings AI Agents Directly to Enterprise Data with Microsoft OneLake Integration
items.summaryShort: Pinecone Brings AI Agents Directly to Enterprise Data with Microsoft OneLake Integration. Pinecone has announced a new integration between its Nexus knowledge engine and Microsoft OneLake, aiming to fundamentally change how enterprise AI ag

items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summaryShort: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living. Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

items.title: Anthropic's safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summaryShort: Anthropic's safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI. Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration.

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
items.summaryShort: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know. TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days.
